zh.North Riding, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Aske於大約1110年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭時，他的父親Wihomarc de Aske52歲，母親Unknown de Taillebois50歲。他與Whitemal de Dalton結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1169年9月29日之前在英國越可爾馬利可。

zh-hans.North Riding, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Aske于大约1110年出生在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭时，他的父亲Wihomarc de Aske52岁，母亲Unknown de Taillebois50岁。他与Whitemal de Dalton结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1169年9月29日之前在英国越可爾馬利可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aske
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Staffordshire): topographic name from northern Middle English ask ‘ash tree’ (Old Norse askr), or a habitational name from Aske (North Yorkshire). Compare Ash .

variants.name: Ash
meanings: English: from Middle English asche ‘ash tree’ (Old English æsc), hence a topographic name for someone living by an ash tree or a habitational name from any of the many places in southern and central England named with this word (Derbyshire, Dorset, Hampshire, Herefordshire, Kent, Surrey, Shropshire, Somerset, and elsewhere).
Americanized form of German   Asch   and   Esch  , the latter ultimately also of Swiss German origin (see   Oesch  ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dufresne  , with the same meaning as 1 above.

variants.name: Axe
meanings: English (West Yorkshire, Lincolnshire): variant of Aske with metathesis of /sk/ to /ks/, spelled with an x.

English (Dorset, Somerset): habitational name from Axe Farm in Chardstock (Devon, formerly in Dorset), itself named for the river Axe, which forms part of the south-eastern boundary of Chardstock parish.
Americanized form of German   Axt   or perhaps of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Aske was born about 1110, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Wihomarc de Aske, was 52 and his mother, Unknown de Taillebois, was 50. He married Whitemal de Dalton. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 29 September 1169, in Marrick, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Aske est né environ 1110, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Wihomarc de Aske, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Unknown de Taillebois, avait 50 ans. Il a épousé Whitemal de Dalton. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 29 septembre 1169, à Marrick, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Aske um 1110 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Wihomarc de Aske 52 und seine Mutter Unknown de Taillebois 50. Er hat Whitemal de Dalton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 29. September 1169 in Marrick, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Aske è nato il circa 1110 nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Wihomarc de Aske, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Unknown de Taillebois, aveva 50 anni. Lui sposato Whitemal de Dalton. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 29 settembre 1169, nel Marrick, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Askeが約1110年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドで生まれた時，父Wihomarc de Askeは52歳，母Unknown de Tailleboisは50歳であった。Whitemal de Daltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1169年9月29日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアマリックで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Aske(이)가 대략 1110년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Wihomarc de Aske(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Unknown de Taillebois(은)는 50세였다. 그는 Whitemal de Dalton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1169년 9월 29일 이전 영국 요르크실르 마릭에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Aske nasceu aproximadamente 1110, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Wihomarc de Aske, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Unknown de Taillebois, tinha 50 anos. Ele casou-se com Whitemal de Dalton. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 29 de setembro de 1169, em Marrick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Aske родился около 1110 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Wihomarc de Aske было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Unknown de Taillebois, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Whitemal de Dalton. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 29 сентябрь 1169 г. в местности маррикк, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Aske nació aproximadamente 1110, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Wihomarc de Aske, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Unknown de Taillebois, tenía 50 años. Se casó con Whitemal de Dalton. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 29 de septiembre de 1169, en Marrick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
